core_doctrine: Control the Pacific through aggressive southern expansion. Secure the Chinese coast early, then push through French Indo-China toward India while protecting the home islands.

strategic_plans.name: Secure Chinese Coast
strategic_plans.reason: Compress Chinese forces westward to gain IPC from coastal provinces and establish a land corridor toward Southeast Asia.
key_actions: Control all Chinese coastal provinces and their buffer zone like Chahar, Anhwe, Anhwe, Hunan,Yunan
strategic_plans.expected_outcome: Control all Chinese coastal provinces and their buffer zone(Chahar, Anhwe, Anhwe, Hunan,Yunan) by round 3

strategic_plans.name: Capture Kwangtung and French Indo China
strategic_plans.reason: Kwangtung is the gateway to French Indo China, which serves as the staging area for the India campaign. Without FIC, India is unreachable by land.
key_actions: Attack Kwangtung once at war with British
Attack French Indo China after occupied Kwantung
strategic_plans.expected_outcome: Control French Indo China by round 5, with 5+ ground units staged for India push

strategic_plans.name: Capture India
strategic_plans.reason: India is a major Allied industrial complex. Capturing it cripples British Pacific income and secures the western flank.
key_actions: Accumulate 6+ ground units in French Indo China/Burma staging area
Use fighters from carriers or nearby airbases for support
Coordinate with amphibious landings via 35/37 Sea Zone
strategic_plans.expected_outcome: Capture India, eliminating British Pacific industrial capacity

known_risks.description: British forces can heavily reinforce India if Japan moves too slowly through French Indo China
known_risks.mitigation: Must reach FIC by round 4 at latest; buy transports early to accelerate troop flow

known_risks.description: Overextending into central China wastes forces on low-value territories
known_risks.mitigation: Ignore Hupeh/Shensi/Szechwan; focus on the coastal-to-FIC corridor

known_risks.description: Transport bottleneck: units on Japan are worthless without transport capacity
known_risks.mitigation: When japan_land >= 4 and transports <= 2, prioritize transport purchases
